live ipo-notif // v1.0 2026-07-03 19:56 UTC

IPO & Investment Watchlist

Tracks publicly traded companies and funds that hold stakes in high-value private unicorns.
Auto-refresh every 30 min — signal pulled from SEC EDGAR, Google News & Yahoo Finance.

last_run2026-07-03 19:56 UTC opportunities888 window60d statusOK

Tracking

Anthropic ~$61BOpenAI ~$157BSpaceX ~$350BStripe ~$65BDatabricks ~$62BEpic Games ~$32BAnduril ~$28BElevenLabs ~$3.3BRevolut ~$45BByteDance ~$220BCanva ~$32BDiscord ~$15BRamp ~$13BBrex ~$12BPlaid ~$13BxAI ~$50BPerplexity ~$9B

Trading // Public Holding Stocks

Live price / NAV / P/E / PEG for stocks holding our target companies. PURE = private stakes are most of the stock's value  |  NOTABLE = meaningful exposure  |  INDIRECT = large company, small relative stake. P/E & PEG come from Yahoo Finance and may be blank for funds (use NAV).

Ticker Last Chg % NAV P/E PEG Type Holdings
DXYZ
Destiny Tech100 Inc 		$24.84 ▲ 0.04% -- -- -- PURE SpaceX ~20% | OpenAI ~17% | Anthropic ~7% | Discord ~5% | Stripe ~4% | Epic Games ~3%
Closed-end fund whose NAV is almost entirely private-company stakes. One of the only ways retail investors can buy SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic in a brokerage account.
RVI
Robinhood Ventures Fund I 		$34.43 ▲ 0.09% -- -- -- PURE OpenAI ~$75M invested (Apr 2026) | Stripe ~$14.6M invested | Databricks undisclosed stake | ElevenLabs undisclosed stake | Revolut undisclosed stake | Ramp undisclosed stake
Robinhood's closed-end fund IPO'd March 6 2026 at $25/share ($658M fund). Dropped 16% on debut. Added a $75M OpenAI stake in April 2026. Pure retail access to pre-IPO unicorns.
ARKVX
ARK Venture Fund 		$58.14 ▲ 0.66% -- -- -- PURE SpaceX ~12% | OpenAI ~5% | Anthropic ~4% | Anduril ~3% | Epic Games ~3% | Discord ~2% | Databricks ~2%
ARK Invest's interval fund — bought via brokerages with quarterly liquidity. Concentrated in late-stage private tech: SpaceX is the largest holding. Priced at NAV (no premium/discount).
SFTBY
SoftBank Group Corp (ADR) 		$18.45 ▲ 4.18% -- -- -- NOTABLE ByteDance ~$20B+ via Vision Fund | Stripe Vision Fund stake | OpenAI ~$1.5B committed (2024) | Revolut lead investor in Series E | Plaid Vision Fund stake
SoftBank's Vision Fund is one of the world's largest tech investors. Vision Fund holdings dominate SoftBank's NAV — analysts often value SFTBY at a discount to underlying portfolio. Trades at ADR (~half a Japanese share).
TCEHY
Tencent Holdings Ltd (ADR) 		$55.35 ▼ 1.51% -- -- -- NOTABLE Epic Games ~40% stake | Discord minority investor | ElevenLabs Series C investor
Owns ~40% of Epic Games (Fortnite, Unreal Engine) — largest single holder. Active investor across global gaming/AI startups. Tencent stake in Epic alone could be worth ~$13B.
CRM
Salesforce Inc 		$166.11 ▲ 1.76% -- -- -- INDIRECT Anthropic Salesforce Ventures lead investor | Stripe Salesforce Ventures stake | Databricks strategic partner & investor
Salesforce Ventures has invested heavily in enterprise AI — Anthropic is a flagship portfolio company. Stake is small relative to CRM's $300B+ market cap, but CRM moves on AI/Anthropic news.
MSFT
Microsoft Corp 		$390.49 ▲ 1.62% -- -- -- INDIRECT OpenAI ~$13B invested
Invested ~$13B in OpenAI and provides Azure as its exclusive cloud. OpenAI is a small % of Microsoft's $3T market cap, but MSFT moves on OpenAI news.
GOOGL
Alphabet Inc 		$359.91 ▼ 0.36% -- -- -- INDIRECT Anthropic ~$2B invested
Invested ~$2B in Anthropic via Google Cloud partnership. Small relative to Alphabet's market cap, but stock reacts to Anthropic milestones.
AMZN
Amazon.com Inc 		$242.67 ▲ 0.40% -- -- -- INDIRECT Anthropic ~$4B invested
Committed up to $4B in Anthropic through AWS. Anthropic models power many AWS AI products.
NVDA
NVIDIA Corp 		$194.83 ▼ 1.39% -- -- -- NOTABLE OpenAI early investor | Anthropic early investor | Databricks strategic investor | xAI strategic investor | Perplexity Series B investor
Early strategic investor in multiple AI unicorns. As the primary GPU supplier, NVDA stock is a broad proxy for AI growth including all target companies.

Upcoming IPOs // Same Criteria, Not Yet Trading

Companies/funds with confirmed S-1 filings or announced public offerings that hold our target unicorns. Add entries to UPCOMING_IPOS in config.py as filings are confirmed.

// no upcoming IPOs in the watchlist yet — add entries to UPCOMING_IPOS in config.py or check the auto-discovered candidates section below

Auto-discovered Candidates

New filers/entities surfaced by the SEC + news monitors that look like investment vehicles holding our target companies. Ranked by number of distinct targets referenced. Use as a feeder list for KNOWN_HOLDING_STOCKS / UPCOMING_IPOS.

// none yet — candidates appear after monitors detect new vehicle filers

SEC Filings

New S-1 (IPO registrations), 13F (institutional holdings), and SC 13G/D filings that mention a target company.

// nothing found yet — check back after the next run

News articles referencing a target company alongside IPO / fund / stake keywords.

Holdings Stock Alerts

Recorded when a known holding stock moved > 5% or saw 2.5× normal volume.

Holdings Monitor SFTBY 2026-07-02 01:30 UTC

SoftBank Group Corp (ADR) (SFTBY): 5.84% down today

SoftBank Group Corp (ADR) (SFTBY) moved 5.84% down today.

SoftBank's Vision Fund is one of the world's largest tech investors. Vision Fund holdings dominate SoftBank's NAV — analysts often value SFTBY at a discount to underlying portfolio. Trades at ADR (~half a Japanese share).

Reported private-company holdings: ByteDance, Stripe, OpenAI, Revolut, Plaid.
Unusual price or volume activity in holding companies often precedes broader market awareness of their private-company stakes. Early positioning before mainstream coverage can offer significant upside.

Destiny Tech100 Inc (DXYZ): 7.32% up today

Destiny Tech100 Inc (DXYZ) moved 7.32% up today.

Closed-end fund whose NAV is almost entirely private-company stakes. One of the only ways retail investors can buy SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic in a brokerage account.

Reported private-company holdings: SpaceX, OpenAI, Anthropic, Discord, Stripe, Epic Games.
Unusual price or volume activity in holding companies often precedes broader market awareness of their private-company stakes. Early positioning before mainstream coverage can offer significant upside.

SoftBank Group Corp (ADR) (SFTBY): 10.69% up today

SoftBank Group Corp (ADR) (SFTBY) moved 10.69% up today.

SoftBank's Vision Fund is one of the world's largest tech investors. Vision Fund holdings dominate SoftBank's NAV — analysts often value SFTBY at a discount to underlying portfolio. Trades at ADR (~half a Japanese share).

Reported private-company holdings: ByteDance, Stripe, OpenAI, Revolut, Plaid.
Unusual price or volume activity in holding companies often precedes broader market awareness of their private-company stakes. Early positioning before mainstream coverage can offer significant upside.

Owns ~40% of Epic Games (Fortnite, Unreal Engine) — largest single holder. Active investor across global gaming/AI startups. Tencent stake in Epic alone could be worth ~$13B.

Reported private-company holdings: Epic Games, Discord, ElevenLabs.
Unusual price or volume activity in holding companies often precedes broader market awareness of their private-company stakes. Early positioning before mainstream coverage can offer significant upside.

Robinhood Ventures Fund I (RVI) moved 22.43% up today and 3.15× average volume.

SoftBank Group Corp (ADR) (SFTBY): 7.49% down today

SoftBank Group Corp (ADR) (SFTBY) moved 7.49% down today.

SoftBank's Vision Fund is one of the world's largest tech investors. Vision Fund holdings dominate SoftBank's NAV — analysts often value SFTBY at a discount to underlying portfolio. Trades at ADR (~half a Japanese share).
